productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Tornado Black Silver Shoe
description: For ultimate comfort while running, get into these puma Tornado shoes to feel the difference. With a breathable mesh upper and a high traction outsole, the sky ride is not very far!Upper Lightweight air mesh upper with synthetic overlays for breathability and structure Cushioned collar and tongue for extra comfort Form stripe on the side for added structure Perforations on the heel cup for breathability Small brand logo embroidered on the toe area Central lacing with concealed eyelets to add to style Outsole extended to the toe box and embedded onto it Midsole Soft, cushy midsole for all-day comfort Removable sockliner to replace with an orthotic Full length phylon midsole for lightweight ride Outsole Abrasion resistant outsole Flex grooves for greater foot flexibility and natural movement of the feet Circular lugs on the side of the forefoot for superior grip Deep horizontal suction points for excellent traction Scooped arch to support ergonomic Fit Brand logo embossed on the sides of the trusstic area
